message:
ci(coverage): serialize llvm-cov jobs to reduce linker OOM

- run cargo-llvm-cov with -j 1 to avoid parallel link spikes
- keep full workspace coverage while stabilizing CI

Co-Authored-By: Codex <noreply@openai.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Generate coverage report
         run: |
-          cargo llvm-cov --workspace \
+          cargo llvm-cov --workspace -j 1 \
             --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/)" \
             --codecov \
             --output-path codecov.json
@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Generate coverage summary
         run: |
-          cargo llvm-cov --workspace \
+          cargo llvm-cov --workspace -j 1 \
             --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/)" \
             --json \
             --output-path coverage.json
